heading: Unresolved safety issues plan
label: 5850 Unresolved safety issues plan
text: The Commission shall develop a plan providing for the specification and analysis of unresolved safety issues relating to nuclear reactors and shall take such action as may be necessary to implement corrective measures with respect to such issues. Such plan shall be submitted to the Congress on or before and progress reports shall be included in the annual report of the Commission thereafter.January 1, 1978
notes: Prior ProvisionsAnother was renumbered section 211 and is classified to .section 210 of Pub. L. 93–438section 5851 of this title
